features: 【Wooden Nail Brush】: Includes 2 pieces of wooden nail brush, suitable for both manicure and pedicure routines.Small and lightweight, the nail brushes for cleaning nails are easy to carry and store, ideal for travel or on-the-go hygiene.
【Double-Sided Design】:Featuring firm plastic bristles on both sides, the Double-Sided Nail Scrubbing Brush effectively removes stubborn dirt and bacteria from under nails without bristle loss.
【Eco-Friendly Material】:Crafted from sustainable wood, this nail cleaning brush ensures durable and long-lasting use while being environmentally conscious.
【Healthy Nail Care】:The nail scrubbing brush exfoliates around cuticles, softens them, and stimulates the nail bed to support healthy nail growth.

【Scope of Application】Sturdy wooden nail brush effortlessly removes dirt, grease, and grime from nails, hands, or even small household items.The perfect pick for mechanics, locksmiths, gardeners, and other professionals involved in manual work.
description: Product Description Product description 2 Pieces wooden nail brush Material: wood, Boar (pig) bristle Color: Natural wood color Size：9.5*3.5*4.5cm Easy to hold The hand cleaner has a comfortable grip design. It works well for mechanics, gardeners and handyman. Natural Bristles The natural boar bristles do not damage nail beds, nor puts a strain on nails when using them. Double sided styles The short bristles on narrow side provides fingernail and toenail cleaning service. The longer bristles on the other can soften cuticles and stimulate the nail bed for healthy nail growth. Product description Durable natural beech wood Harder sisal, easy to clean dirt Waterproof and not moldy Ergonomic and more comfortable to hold Cotton cord for easy hanging and drying Tips： Natural drying and don't expose to sun, To dry hand cleaning brush after using it and store it in a dry place. Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The colors may exist slight difference due to different screens. Directions After using the nail brush, dry it and store it in a dry place.
